evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 de-20251126xex99d1.htm EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 (Furnished herewith) ÔÇő , News Release ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő Contact: Jen Hartmann Director, Public Relations HartmannJenniferA@JohnDeere.com ÔÇő Deere Reports Net Income of $1.065 Billion for Fourth Quarter, $5.027 Billion for Fiscal Year ÔŚĆ 2025 results highlight resilient performance in the face of difficult market conditions ÔŚĆ Outlook for small ag and construction and forestry improves as large ag remains subdued ÔŚĆ Full-year 2026 earnings are projected to be between $4.00 billion and $4.75 billion MOLINE, Illinois (November 26, 2025) ÔÇö Deere & Company reported net income of $1.065 billion for   Normalized numeric aliases: $1.065 Billion = 10ýľÁ 6,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $5.027 Billion = 50ýľÁ 2,700Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $4.00 billion = 40ýľÁ ŰőČŰčČ; $4.75 billion = 47ýľÁ 5,000Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $1.065 billion = 10ýľÁ 6,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $1.245 billion = 12ýľÁ 4,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $5.027 billion = 50ýľÁ 2,700Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $1.065 = 1.065ŰőČŰčČ; $4.00 = 4.00ŰőČŰčČ; $18.50 = 18.50ŰőČŰčČ; $4.75 = 4.75ŰőČŰčČ; $3.93 = 3.93ŰőČŰčČ; $1.245 = 1.245ŰőČŰčČ; $4.55 = 4.55ŰőČŰčČ.

per share, compared with $7.100 billion, or $25.62 per share, in fiscal 2024. Worldwide net sales and revenues increased 11%, to $12.394 billion, for the fourth quarter of 2025 and decreased 12%, to $45.684 billion, for the full year. Net sales were $10.579 billion for the quarter and $38.917 billion for the year, compared with $9.275 billion and $44.759 billion in fiscal 2024, respectively. ÔÇťThis past year brought its share of challenges and uncertainty, but thanks to the structural improvements weÔÇÖve made and the diverse customer segments and geographies we serve, we were able to achieve our best re  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.100 billion = 71ýľÁ ŰőČŰčČ; $12.394 billion = 123ýľÁ 9,400Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $45.684 billion = 456ýľÁ 8,400Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $10.579 billion = 105ýľÁ 7,900Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $38.917 billion = 389ýľÁ 1,700Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $9.275 billion = 92ýľÁ 7,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $44.759 billion = 447ýľÁ 5,900Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $7.100 = 7.100ŰőČŰčČ; $12.394 = 12.394ŰőČŰčČ; $44.759 = 44.759ŰőČŰčČ; $45.684 = 45.684ŰőČŰčČ; $10.579 = 10.579ŰőČŰčČ; $38.917 = 38.917ŰőČŰčČ; $9.275 = 9.275ŰőČŰčČ.

ome attributable to Deere & Company for fiscal 2026 is forecasted to be in a range of $4.00 billion to $4.75 billion. ÔÇťLooking ahead, we believe 2026 will mark the bottom of the large ag cycle,ÔÇŁ May stated. ÔÇťWhile ongoing margin pressures from tariffs and persistent challenges in the large ag sector remain, our commitment to inventory management and cost control, coupled with expected growth in small agriculture & turf and construction & forestry, positions us to effectively manage the business and seize emerging opportunities as market conditions begin to recover.ÔÇŁ ÔÇő 4 ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő ÔÇő  Normalized numeric aliases: $4.00 billion = 40ýľÁ ŰőČŰčČ; $4.75 billion = 47ýľÁ 5,000Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; $4.00 = 4.00ŰőČŰčČ; $4.75 = 4.75ŰőČŰčČ; $1,065 = 1,065ŰőČŰčČ; $1,245 = 1,245ŰőČŰčČ; $5,027 = 5,027ŰőČŰčČ; $7,100 = 7,100ŰőČŰčČ; 11,143 million = 111ýľÁ 4,300Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 5,027 million = 50ýľÁ 2,700Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 45,684 million = 456ýľÁ 8,400Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 51,716 million = 517ýľÁ 1,600Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 1,065 million = 10ýľÁ 6,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 1,245 million = 12ýľÁ 4,500Űžî ŰőČŰčČ; 7,100 million = 71ýľÁ ŰőČŰčČ.
